query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.claim_number,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_year,
  c.vehicle_registration,
  c.incident_type,
  c.reported_cause_label,
  c.incident_location,
  c.status,
  a.id AS assessment_id,
  a.estimated_cost,
  a.fraud_risk_level,
  a.structural_damage_severity,
  a.accident_type,
  LEFT(a.damage_description, 150) AS damage_desc,
  c.created_at
FROM claims c
JOIN ai_assessments a ON a.claim_id = c.id
WHERE a.damage_description IS NOT NULL 
  AND a.damage_description != ''
  AND a.estimated_cost IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

FROM claims c

WHERE a.damage_description IS NOT NULL 
  AND a.damage_description != ''
